template_data.headline_html: How teaming turned zero history into a first win.

image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Left side: illustrated timeline with three milestone icons connected by an upward arrow path — labeled '0 PP', 'TEAMING', 'FIRST WIN'. Right side: illustrated professional in blazer standing confidently, arms crossed, slight smile. Bold headline at top: 'TEAMING: FASTEST PATH FROM ZERO'. One highlighted callout box with bold accent text: 'TEAM FIRST. PRIME NEXT.' Cream background with dark navy accents. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
